title: Trellix Web Gateway Security Event
description: Represents a security event detected by the Trellix Web Gateway, including malware detections, phishing attempts, policy violations, and data loss prevention triggers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the security event

severity.description: Severity level of the security event

sourceIp.description: IP address of the client that triggered the event

user.description: Authenticated user name associated with the event

url.description: URL involved in the security event

threatName.description: Name of the detected threat or malware

action.description: Action taken by the gateway in response to the event

ruleName.description: Name of the policy rule that triggered the event

details.description: Additional descriptive details about the event
